name: Taiwan
contextBlurb: Taiwan's housing portfolio sits within the Ministry of the Interior, currently led by Liu Shyh-fang (DPP), through the National Land Management Agency (NLMA). Coverage of Legislative Yuan housing legislation is thin in the current release. The tracker continues to monitor Taiwanese government activity around social-housing supply and rental subsidies.

keyFigures.name: Liu Shyh-fang
keyFigures.role: Minister of the Interior (housing portfolio via NLMA)
